name: Diary of the Grizzly Man
overview: Crafted from the film archive and journals of Timothy Treadwell (subject of Werner Herzog’s acclaimed documentary GRIZZLY MAN), this series takes us deep inside the unfolding dramas and life-and-death struggles of the wild animals he devoted his life to loving and understanding.

trailers.title: Diary Of The Grizzly Man | Official Trailer | 2022
